creator: agh@riseup.net
text:
I used to get that error in X11, so not sure if the following helps. Install misc/qt6ct, and configure the environment variable QT_QPA_PLATFORMTHEME="qt6ct"; you could also try setting it to one of the options from:
> Available platform plugins are: minimal, offscreen, vkkhrdisplay, vnc, xcb, wayland, wayland-egl.

Maybe wayland?
You can also configure QT_DEBUG_PLUGINS=1 in your start-kde6 script to get more information.
